headline: Big Banks Can Weather Severe Recession, Fed Says, in Unusual Year for Stress Tests
summary: The Federal Reserve said the nation’s largest banks could absorb $708 billion in losses and keep lending, though this year’s stress-test results won’t affect capital requirements.

raw.headline: Big Banks Can Weather Severe Recession, Fed Says, in Unusual Year for Stress Tests
raw.summary: The Federal Reserve said the nation’s largest banks could absorb $708 billion in losses and keep lending, though this year’s stress-test results won’t affect capital requirements.

headline: JPMorgan and Goldman raise dividends after Fed stress tests
summary: Investing.com -- JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) said its board plans to increase the quarterly common stock dividend to $1.65 per share from $1.50 per share, starting in the third quarter of 2026. The increase is pending board approval at the time of declaration.

headline: Taktile Secures $110M in Goldman Sachs-led Series C to Power AI Transformation in Financial Institutions
summary: NEW YORK, June 24, 2026--Taktile, the leader in AI transformation for financial institutions, today announced its $110 million Series C fundraise. Growth Equity at Goldman Sachs Alternatives led the round, with participation from Balderton Capital, Index Ventures, Tiger Global, Y Combinator, and Dig Ventures.
